campaign.name: US — Self-Cleaning Litter Box — Web Conversions
campaign.bid_strategy: Lowest Cost (no cap) for first 3–5 days, then Cost Cap at target CPA once 20+ purchases logged
campaign.schedule: All day, dayparting OFF during learning phase

pixel.advanced_matching: Enabled (email + phone hashed via existing helper)
pixel.events_api_capi: Recommended next step — server-side dedupe via supabase/functions/tiktok-events

behaviors: Add to cart — Pet supplies (last 28 days)

audience.lookalike: 1-3% of CompletePayment (last 180 days) — needs 100+ seed events
audience.fallback_until_seed_ready: Use AG1 audience + behavior 'Online shoppers — Pets'

ad_groups.name: AG3 — Retargeting Warm
ad_groups.note: Launch only after AG1/AG2 have driven 500+ ViewContent events

creatives.hook_first_3s: POV: you haven't scooped in 14 days 😼
script: 0:00 — Close-up of cat walking into self-cleaning box, soft chime SFX
0:03 — Text overlay: 'I haven't scooped in 14 days'
0:06 — Time-lapse: box auto-cycles, waste sealed away
0:10 — Owner on couch, no nose-pinch reaction
0:14 — Side-by-side: traditional box (smell lines) vs ours (clean)
0:18 — CTA card: 'Free US shipping over $35 → link in bio'
creatives.caption: Scooping is officially canceled 😮‍💨 Self-cleaning litter box that handles it for you. Free US shipping $35+. #catsoftiktok #cattok #cathacks #petparents
creatives.music: Trending lo-fi or 'oddly satisfying' track from TikTok Commercial Music Library only
creatives.compliance_notes: No medical claims. No 'eliminates 100%' language. Use 'reduces odor' not 'no smell'. No before/after that implies health outcome.

creatives.hook_first_3s: 3 reasons I threw out my old litter box
script: 0:00 — Person holds phone, walks into bathroom
0:08 — Cut to new box, 'Reason 2: scooping every day'
0:18 — Show cat using new box calmly
0:26 — CTA: 'Tap the link, free shipping today'
creatives.caption: Three reasons I'll never go back to a regular litter box 🙃 #catmom #litterbox #petproducts #cattok

script: 0:00 — Tight shot of box detecting cat exit
creatives.caption: Oddly satisfying litter box cycle 🌀 #asmr #oddlysatisfying #cattok #smartpets

script: 0:22 — CTA: 'Read full comparison — link in bio'
creatives.caption: We tested both — here's what surprised us. Full breakdown on site. #catreview #petproducts
creatives.compliance_notes: Use 'in our test' framing. Do NOT claim Litter-Robot is unsafe or inferior — only price/feature compare.

creatives.hook_first_3s: Still thinking about it? Here's why people wait
script: 0:00 — Text: '"Will my cat actually use it?"'
0:04 — Show 3 different cats using it (real footage)
creatives.caption: 30-day returns. Your cat (and your nose) will thank you. #cattok

creatives.hook_first_3s: Reading our reviews so you don't have to
script: 0:06 — Highlight key phrases: 'no more smell', 'cat adapted in 2 days'
creatives.caption: Real reviews from real cat parents 🐾 #cattok #petparents

must_have_above_fold: Hook headline matches ad (smell / scooping / safety)
Trust strip: free shipping $35+, 30-day returns, US-based support
landing_page.tracking_check: Confirm ttTrackViewContent fires on PDP and ttTrackAddToCart fires on ATC click

launch_checklist: 1. Verify TikTok Pixel CompletePayment fires on /thank-you (use dev panel)
2. Submit creatives to TikTok Commercial Library — only use cleared music
3. Whitelist ad domain getpawsy.pet in TikTok Business Center
4. Enable Advanced Matching (hashed email/phone) in Pixel settings
5. Launch AG1 + AG2 simultaneously, AG3 paused until warm audience >1k
6. Day 0–3: do not edit. Let learning phase complete (50 events)
7. Day 4: kill creatives with CTR <0.8% or CPC >$1.50

kill_criteria.ad_group: CPA >2× target after 20 conversions OR 7 days no purchase

tiktok_ad_policy: Music must come from TikTok Commercial Music Library
ftc: Reviews shown must be verifiable on site
Comparison claims must be substantiated in our own test

next_steps_after_test: Implement TikTok Events API (server-side CAPI) via new edge function for iOS 14+ signal recovery
Add dynamic product feed for Video Shopping Ads once TikTok Shop US becomes available (currently blocked — see mem://compliance/tiktok-shop-us-not-pursued)
Build /lp/tt-self-cleaning-litter-box variant with TikTok-native styling (vertical-first, fewer trust seals, more UGC)
